megamenu.featuredDesc: End-to-end packaging from corrugated to luxury rigid gift boxes. FSC® and ISO certified.

home.productsDesc: End-to-end packaging solutions for global brands — manufactured across Vietnam, China & Thailand.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to bring your packaging to life?
home.ctaDesc: Get a tailored quote for your corrugated, rigid, or folding packaging needs.
home.networkDesc: With production bases in Bac Ninh (Vietnam), Dongguan (China), and Saraburi (Thailand), we deliver consistent quality, fast turnaround, and competitive production capacity across Asia.
home.trustedDesc: We serve retail, electronics, food & beverage, and cosmetics brands worldwide, with reliable logistics for export. With OEM & ODM experience and certifications including GMI, SMETA-4P, and ISTA, we ensure compliance, durability, and premium visual results.
home.qualityDesc: We believe packaging should safeguard your product and the planet. All materials are FSC®-certified, recyclable, and responsibly sourced. We invest in eco-friendly inks, water-based coatings, and recyclable paperboard to help partners achieve their sustainability goals.
home.partnerTitle: Ready to work with a proven manufacturing partner?
home.partnerDesc: Looking for a reliable packaging manufacturer in Vietnam? Our export team is ready to help with samples, design mock-ups, and fast production.

about.heroTitle: Global Printing and Packaging Expertise Built Across Asia
about.heroDesc: Delivering world-class packaging solutions through our dual-hub manufacturing network in China, Vietnam and Thailand.
about.hubsDesc: Our Vietnam and China bases, plus our new Thailand hub, give global brands the flexibility, capacity, and export reach they need.
about.chinaDesc: Specializing in premium color boxes and board-game packaging. Roland and Komori press lines ensure precision.
about.vietnamDesc: FSC-certified production for export markets under ASEAN RCEP coverage. 1M gift boxes + 10M labels monthly.
about.thailandDesc: Focusing on e-commerce packaging and rapid regional logistics.
about.techDesc: Unified digital proofing and CTP systems enable 72-hour design-to-production turnaround across our network. Vietnam's UV foiling and eco coatings meet EU/US compliance and anti-counterfeiting standards.
about.capabilitiesDesc: Our advanced manufacturing facilities are equipped with state-of-the-art printing and finishing technology, enabling us to handle projects of any scale with precision and consistency. From short runs to mass production, we deliver high-volume output while maintaining exceptional quality standards across every order.
about.qualityDesc: Quality is at the core of our operations. With strict quality control protocols and certifications including FSC®, ISO, SMETA-4P, and GMI, we ensure every packaging product meets international standards. Each stage — from raw material selection to final inspection — follows a zero-defect policy to guarantee consistency, reliability, and brand protection.
about.customDesc: Every brand is unique, and so is every packaging solution we create. Our design and engineering teams collaborate closely with clients to develop tailor-made structures, finishes, and visual concepts that reflect their identity. By combining creativity with advanced CAD design and digital proofing systems, we turn concepts into market-ready packaging that stands out on the shelf.
about.philosophyDesc: We believe long-term partnerships are built on trust, quality, and continuous innovation. By combining engineering precision with creative design, we deliver packaging solutions that inspire confidence and support our clients' growth worldwide.
about.ctaDesc: Ready to discuss your packaging project? Our export team is ready to help.

jewelry.heroSubtitle: Velvet, Rigid & Hinged-Lid Packaging for Rings, Necklaces & Luxury Jewelry Brands
jewelry.heroDesc: Premium jewelry packaging requires precision, luxury finishes, and durable construction. Our custom jewelry gift boxes combine elegant design with high-quality materials — ensuring every piece, from rings and bracelets to necklaces and pendants, is presented with the refinement the brand deserves.
jewelry.three1Desc: Snap and magnetic hinged lids aligned to sub-millimeter tolerances — the tactile signature of a premium jewelry box.
jewelry.three2Desc: Velvet, suede, silk, linen, and leatherette coverings that signal luxury from the first touch.
jewelry.three3Desc: Slotted ring holders, necklace ribbon lifts, watch pillows, earring trays — every interior custom to the piece.
jewelry.typesDesc: From single-ring boxes to multi-piece gift sets — we engineer the interior around the product.
jewelry.type1Desc: Velvet or suede interior with snap or magnetic hinged lid. Custom shapes including square, round, and heart for bridal and engagement.
jewelry.type2Desc: Long or square formats with ribbon lift tabs and EVA or velvet-lined platforms that display the piece beautifully.
jewelry.type3Desc: Larger formats with cushion inserts and rigid board with premium wrap finishes. Sized to common bangle and watch diameters.
jewelry.type4Desc: Foam or velvet insert panels that hold pairs precisely. Available with book-style openings for dramatic reveals.
jewelry.type5Desc: Compartmental inserts with custom foam or velvet trays — engineered for matching ring + necklace + earring collections.
jewelry.type6Desc: Compact hinged cases and book-style presentation boxes for retail displays, trunk shows, and traveling sales.
jewelry.interiorDesc: Jewelry packaging demands interior engineering that holds the piece centered, protected, and perfectly presented — the difference between a box and a retail experience.
jewelry.int1: Velvet-covered ring slots with slit-fit retention
jewelry.int2: Satin ribbon lift tabs for necklaces and pendants
jewelry.int4: Molded EVA or sponge foam inserts
jewelry.materialsDesc: Jewelry boxes need both beauty and structural strength. Every box is built on rigid greyboard with a textile or paper wrap and a precision-engineered interior.
jewelry.mat1Desc: 1000–1800 gsm — structural core that holds hinge alignment for years
jewelry.mat2Desc: Velvet, suede, leatherette, linen, silk — or printed art paper for lighter looks
jewelry.mat3Desc: Soft-touch velvet, satin, microfiber, or flocked finishes
jewelry.mat4Desc: Snap, magnetic, or concealed fabric hinges tuned for the right opening feel
jewelry.finishDesc: Jewelry packaging is a core part of brand identity. These are the treatments high-end jewelry brands rely on for retail impact.
jewelry.finish1: Gold, silver, and rose gold hot foil stamping
jewelry.finish2: Embossing and debossing for raised logos
jewelry.useTitle: From bridal to fashion — jewelry packaging for every category
jewelry.useDesc: Our boxes protect rings, necklaces, watches, pendants, and multi-piece sets for jewelers around the world.
jewelry.sustainDesc: Every custom jewelry gift box is manufactured using environmentally responsible materials. Production runs at our Vietnam Xinyuanjia facility and our Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Factory.
jewelry.formDesc: Share the piece you want to package — ring, necklace, watch, set — plus your brand guidelines and target volume. Our engineering team responds within 1 business day.

largeGift.heroSubtitle: Oversized Rigid, Paper and Carton Gift Boxes for Retail, Hampers and Premium Packaging
largeGift.heroDesc: Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures large-format gift boxes for premium retail, apparel, seasonal hampers, promotional sets, and corporate gifting. Factories in Vietnam and China produce oversized rigid boxes, large folding cartons, and large corrugated gift boxes — with reinforced corners and engineering optimized for size and weight.
largeGift.three1Desc: Built with reinforced greyboard or corrugated materials for heavy load support and structural integrity at scale.
largeGift.three2Desc: Large-format surfaces allow luxury finishing, impactful branding, and shelf-dominating retail display.
largeGift.three3Desc: Designed for hampers, apparel sets, promotional kits, and international gifting programs.
largeGift.typesDesc: Every structure engineered for size, weight distribution, and corner stability.
largeGift.type1Desc: Large rigid boxes with thick greyboard for maximum durability and premium shelf presence. Available with magnetic closures, drawer structures, book-style, or two-piece lid-and-base.
largeGift.type2Desc: Paperboard gift boxes for lightweight, oversized retail packaging. Offset printed and laminated with matte, gloss, or soft-touch finishes.
largeGift.type3Desc: Corrugated gift boxes using B, E, BE or BC flute combinations for superior strength. Ideal for shipping hampers, heavy items, and e-commerce gifting.
largeGift.type4Desc: Classic lid-and-base scaled to large formats with reinforced walls and clean edges — premium retail display for luxury goods and merchandising kits.
largeGift.type5Desc: Flat-packed large rigid boxes that reduce shipping volume significantly. Magnetic side panels or reinforced folding mechanisms for export programs.
largeGift.useDesc: Each structure is calibrated to the demands of its end use — presentation, protection, or efficient export shipping.
largeGift.use1Desc: Christmas, Lunar New Year, and holiday gift sets — premium food, drinks, and curated assortments.
largeGift.use2Desc: Oversized boxes for clothing gift sets, matching accessories, and premium fashion retail.
largeGift.use3Desc: High-volume branded gift programs for client appreciation, employee kits, and event swag.
largeGift.use4Desc: Heavy-duty boxes for multi-bottle sets, bottle + accessories pairings, and limited editions.
largeGift.use5Desc: Retailer press kits, influencer drops, and PR mailers with big-impact branding surfaces.
largeGift.use6Desc: Export-ready corrugated hampers with tear strips, reinforced bases, and shipping durability.
largeGift.materialsDesc: Structural CAD development ensures accurate panel alignment, load distribution, and corner stability — critical when boxes get big.
largeGift.mat1Desc: Calibrated per size and weight — thicker boards for heavier load paths
largeGift.mat2Desc: Double-wall combinations for oversized hamper shipping strength
largeGift.mat3Desc: Art, kraft, textured, specialty, and fabric-style veneers — all printable
largeGift.mat4Desc: Engineered load distribution prevents collapse on heavy or tall boxes
largeGift.mat5Desc: 3D modeling and die-line development for every custom panel
largeGift.mat6Desc: Hand-built samples verify fit, weight handling, and shipping durability
largeGift.finishDesc: Large formats are also large canvases — we use that real estate for maximum brand impact.
largeGift.finish1: Hot foil stamping on oversized panels
largeGift.finish2: Embossing and debossing for tactile logos
largeGift.finish4: Offset printing with precise artwork alignment
largeGift.finish5: Tear strips and reinforced opening mechanisms
largeGift.sustainDesc: Big boxes don't have to mean big waste. Every large gift box can be produced with FSC-certified greyboard, recycled kraft, water-based inks, and low-VOC coatings. Production follows ISO 9001 and SMETA frameworks.
largeGift.formTitle: Get a Quote for Your Large Box Project
largeGift.formDesc: Our engineering team provides structural drawings, prototype sampling, and production planning for oversized gift box programs. Share dimensions, weight, and volume — we'll reply within 1 business day.

customPrinted.heroSubtitle: Branded Rigid, Folding Carton, and Mailer Gift Boxes — Printed to Your Artwork
customPrinted.heroDesc: Jinhao Xinyuan specializes in custom printed gift boxes for retail brands, cosmetics, electronics, premium product lines, and corporate gifting programs. Factories in Vietnam and China produce rigid, folding carton, and printed corrugated gift boxes under ISO 9001, FSC®, SMETA and GMI standards — ensuring consistent color reproduction, structural stability, and export-ready packaging.
customPrinted.three1Desc: Pantone-matched printing with GMI-controlled color accuracy and high-resolution artwork reproduction.
customPrinted.three2Desc: Custom die-lines, CAD development, and product-fitting engineering for any shape or size.
customPrinted.three3Desc: High-end finishing — foil stamping, embossing, textured specialty papers, and holographic effects.
customPrinted.techTitle: Four print workflows, one consistent color standard
customPrinted.techDesc: We run full in-house printing production — offset for folding cartons, flexo for corrugated, and specialty processes for premium finishes. Every job is color-controlled to GMI standards with Pantone matching.
customPrinted.tech1Desc: Up to 6-color printing with precise artwork alignment for folding cartons and litho-laminated rigid boxes.
customPrinted.tech2Desc: 5-color flexo on B, E, BE, and BC corrugated flutes for mailers and shipping gift boxes.
customPrinted.tech3Desc: GMI-controlled spectrophotometer color verification for every production run.
customPrinted.tech4Desc: In-house prepress supports customer artwork or full design development from brief.
customPrinted.productsDesc: Integrated printing, die-cutting, corrugation, and gluing — all in-house at our Vietnam and China factories.
customPrinted.prod1Desc: Wrapped in printed or specialty papers with brand artwork. Magnetic, drawer, book-style, collapsible, or two-piece structures. For cosmetics, premium retail, electronics, corporate gifts.
customPrinted.prod2Desc: Offset-printed cartons with precise artwork alignment. For lightweight retail goods, beauty, accessories, consumer products. Optional window patching and protective coatings.
customPrinted.prod3Desc: Offset or flexo printing on B, E, BE, BC flutes. For e-commerce, subscription gifting, seasonal packaging, and promotional campaigns. Tear strips, reinforced corners, and internal dividers available.
customPrinted.prod4Desc: Textured materials, foil boards, holographic finishes, sustainable kraft-based prints, and limited-edition packaging for premium branding and retail launches.
customPrinted.prod5Desc: Custom die-lines, engineered inserts, and tailored closure systems for product stability, weight support, and optimized unboxing.
customPrinted.finishDesc: The finish is the difference between a printed box and a premium brand experience.
customPrinted.finish1: Hot foil stamping (gold, silver, rose gold, custom)
customPrinted.finish2: Embossing and debossing for tactile branding
customPrinted.industriesDesc: Every job tailored to client artwork, brand guidelines, and product requirements.
customPrinted.specsDesc: We match board to application, paper to print finish, and flute to function.
customPrinted.spec1Desc: 1.5–3.0 mm — tuned to product weight and perceived heft
customPrinted.spec2Desc: 250–450 gsm — offset printing and folding cartons
customPrinted.spec3Desc: B, E, BE, BC — single or double wall for every use case
customPrinted.spec4Desc: Art, kraft, textured, metallic, and sustainable fibers
customPrinted.sustainDesc: Every custom printed gift box can be produced with FSC-certified paper and greyboard, recycled materials, water-based inks, low-VOC coatings, and eco-friendly laminations. All factories follow ISO 9001 and SMETA frameworks.
customPrinted.formTitle: Get a Quote for Custom Printed Gift Boxes
customPrinted.formDesc: Share your artwork (or brief), product dimensions, volume, and finishing preferences — our engineering and prepress teams respond within 1 business day.

luxuryRigid.heroSubtitle: Premium Magnetic, Drawer, Book-Style and Collapsible Rigid Boxes
luxuryRigid.heroDesc: High-quality luxury rigid gift boxes for cosmetics, electronics, jewelry, spirits, and corporate gifting. Produced in our Vietnam and China factories under FSC, ISO 9001, SMETA, and GMI color management standards.
luxuryRigid.feat1: FSC® · ISO 9001 · SMETA · GMI certified production
luxuryRigid.feat2: Semi-automatic and fully-automated rigid assembly lines
luxuryRigid.feat3: CAD engineering, sampling, and mass production
luxuryRigid.feat4: Greyboard from 1.0 mm to 3.0 mm with custom wrapping papers
luxuryRigid.featIntroBody: Every rigid box is engineered for precise corners, consistent surface finishing, and strong structural integrity — the tactile cues that tell a customer they're holding a premium product. Our rigid workshops combine craftsmanship with volume capacity, supporting everything from small brand launches to high-volume cosmetic and electronics programs.
luxuryRigid.typesDesc: Choose the structure that matches your product, your brand story, and your unboxing moment.
luxuryRigid.type1Desc: Premium appearance with a strong, secure closure. Commonly used for cosmetics, electronics, presentation kits, and corporate gifting. Clean corner finishing and high-quality wrapped paper.
luxuryRigid.type2Desc: Smooth slide-out mechanism with enhanced product protection. Suitable for jewelry, accessories, electronics, and high-value retail products. Customizable sleeves, ribbon pulls, and printed wrapping.
luxuryRigid.type3Desc: Hardcover design with large surfaces for branding and graphics. Commonly used in electronics, cosmetics, and premium gift sets. Magnetic or ribbon closures available.
luxuryRigid.type4Desc: Also known as two-piece rigid boxes. Widely used across retail categories, offering flexibility in height, thickness, and interior layout. Simple to assemble, premium in feel.
luxuryRigid.type5Desc: Reduce shipping volume while maintaining a high-end appearance when assembled. Magnetic or Velcro closures allow the box to fold flat for transportation. Ideal for international shipping and e-commerce.
luxuryRigid.finishTitle: Finishing techniques that make a rigid box feel premium
luxuryRigid.finishDesc: The difference between a generic box and a luxury one is in the finish. Our Vietnam and China workshops offer the full range of premium surface treatments.
luxuryRigid.finish1Desc: Metallic gold, silver, rose gold, and custom foils for logos and typography
luxuryRigid.finish2Desc: Raised or recessed impressions that add tactile depth to branding
luxuryRigid.finish3Desc: Selective glossy accents on a matte surface for contrast
luxuryRigid.finish4Desc: Full-surface finishes that protect and elevate the paper wrapping
luxuryRigid.finish5Desc: Velvet-like hand-feel that signals premium at first touch
luxuryRigid.finish6Desc: Textured, metallic, linen, and fabric-style wrapping papers
luxuryRigid.materialsDesc: Every rigid box starts with the right board and finishes with the right wrap. We match structure to product and brand.
luxuryRigid.mat1Desc: 1.0 mm to 3.0 mm thickness — calibrated to product weight, fragility, and perceived heft
luxuryRigid.mat2Desc: Art paper, kraft, textured, specialty, and fabric-style coverings — printed or laminated
luxuryRigid.mat3Desc: EVA foam inserts, vacuum-formed trays, silk or satin linings, ribbon lifts
luxuryRigid.mat4Desc: Magnets, ribbons, Velcro, flip-lock, drawer pulls — whatever suits the unboxing ritual
luxuryRigid.industriesDesc: Rigid gift box programs built around the needs of high-value retail verticals.
luxuryRigid.sustainDesc: Premium doesn't have to mean wasteful. Every rigid box can be produced with FSC-certified greyboard, recycled paper options, and water-based or soy-based inks. Low-VOC coatings and eco-friendly laminations are available across our luxury range. All factories operate under ISO 9001 and SMETA compliance frameworks.
luxuryRigid.sustain4: Recycled board and alternative fiber materials
luxuryRigid.processTitle: How we build a luxury rigid box program
luxuryRigid.process1Desc: You share product dimensions, brand guidelines, and target experience
luxuryRigid.process2Desc: Our engineers develop 3D structural design and cutting dielines
luxuryRigid.process3Desc: We produce hand-made samples for tactile review and sign-off
luxuryRigid.process4Desc: Full run on semi-automatic or automated assembly lines
luxuryRigid.formTitle: Request a Quote for Luxury Rigid Gift Boxes
luxuryRigid.formDesc: Share your brand, product category, and target unboxing experience — our design team will send a concept direction and quote within 1 business day.

shelfReady.heroDesc: XinYuan manufactures shelf ready packaging (SRP) that makes retail simpler, faster, and more sustainable. Our factories in Vietnam and China produce high-strength corrugated and hybrid paperboard packaging for global brands in FMCG, food, beverage, and e-commerce sectors.
shelfReady.heroLede: Engineered for easy opening, quick shelf loading, and maximum visibility — every SRP unit saves time, cuts waste, and boosts sales at point of purchase.
shelfReady.feat1: FSC and ISO-certified production ensuring quality and traceability
shelfReady.feat2: Durable corrugated designs that support stacking and shipping
shelfReady.feat3: Easy-open perforations for efficient restocking and minimal handling
shelfReady.feat5: Fully recyclable kraft and white paperboard materials
shelfReady.introTitle: Shelf Ready Packaging that Delivers More
shelfReady.introBody: Shelf Ready Packaging is more than just a box — it's a complete retail solution designed to improve efficiency from warehouse to shelf. By ensuring quick replenishment, strong visibility, and low handling time, our SRP helps retailers reduce costs and improve the shopper experience. With designs tailored to retailer requirements and brand guidelines, XinYuan's packaging enhances product impact and supply-chain performance alike.
shelfReady.benefit1Desc: Perforations and tear-strips designed for fast shelf setup without tools.
shelfReady.benefit2Desc: High-impact print and structural design for fast shopper recognition.
shelfReady.benefit3Desc: Reinforced corrugated structures that survive pallet, truck, and backroom.
shelfReady.benefit4Desc: FSC-certified kraft liners and water-based inks — zero compromise on brand visuals.
shelfReady.benefit5Desc: Flat-packed for logistics, pre-printed with shipping marks and scan codes.
shelfReady.benefit6Desc: Custom-sized to major retail chain specs with brand-guideline accuracy.
shelfReady.typesDesc: From supermarket aisles to e-commerce fulfillment — SRP engineered around the channel.
shelfReady.type1Desc: Shelf-ready trays and display cartons for FMCG chains. Grease- and moisture-resistant coatings available.
shelfReady.type2Desc: Easy-open corrugated mailers and hybrid boxes engineered for fast fulfillment-center throughput.
shelfReady.type3Desc: Protective and visually appealing display boxes that double as in-store retail presentation.
shelfReady.type4Desc: Flat-packed cartons for efficient shipment, strong pallet stacking, and minimal restocking labor.
shelfReady.heavyDesc: Our corrugated packaging is built for strength, precision, and sustainability. We use B, E, and BC flute combinations to balance durability with lightweight efficiency. Each carton is performance-tested to ensure reliability across storage, transit, and retail display.
shelfReady.heavy1: B, E, and BC flute options
shelfReady.perfDesc: Every XinYuan SRP is built to perform under pressure. Our corrugated boards are engineered for stacking strength while minimizing material use. We use water-based flexographic inks, recyclable kraft liners, and eco-optimized fluting for maximum sustainability. From design to delivery, our packaging supports closed-loop recycling and carbon-efficient logistics.
shelfReady.perf1Desc: Engineered for full-pallet loads and on-shelf stability
shelfReady.perf2Desc: Structural optimization reduces paper use without sacrificing strength
shelfReady.perf3Desc: Flexographic printing with low-VOC, retailer-compliant inks
shelfReady.perf4Desc: 100% recyclable kraft and white paperboard liners
shelfReady.capDesc: Automated lines combine corrugation, die-cutting, and inline printing for high-volume efficiency.
shelfReady.formTitle: Request a Quote for Shelf Ready Packaging
shelfReady.formDesc: Tell us the retailer, product, SKU count, and volumes — we'll reply with a tailored SRP design brief within 1 business day.

trays.heroDesc: XinYuan manufactures corrugated packaging in Vietnam — including custom cardboard trays and die-cut inserts engineered for protection, precision, and sustainability. Our solutions help global brands reduce waste while improving product presentation and logistics efficiency.
trays.featuresTitle: Engineered for fit, built for scale
trays.feat2: Custom-fit inserts, dividers and trays for automated assembly
trays.feat4: Die-cut, laminated, and printed finishes available
trays.introBody1: At XinYuan, we design and manufacture corrugated trays, box inserts, and cardboard dividers that provide structural strength and optimized space utilization for a wide range of industries. From e-commerce shipments to retail product displays, our solutions combine durability, cost efficiency, and precise construction.
trays.introBody2: Our factories in Vietnam and China produce both standard and custom-fit tray solutions, ensuring every product is well-protected throughout transport and display.
trays.gradeTitle: Supplying Every Grade Your Business Needs
trays.gradeDesc: XinYuan supplies a complete range of cardboard grades and insert configurations engineered for both high-volume logistics and custom retail packaging. Our materials include Kraft liners, white-top liners, and specialty coated boards, ensuring both durability and superior print results. Each tray or insert is cut with automated precision equipment, guaranteeing dimensional accuracy and consistent fit — even at scale.
trays.useDesc: Our tray and insert systems are engineered around the specific demands of each sector.
trays.use1Desc: Anti-static inserts and secure-fit cradles that protect components from ESD and movement damage.
trays.use2Desc: Moisture-resistant coatings and recyclable trays rated for cold-chain and bottling lines.
trays.use3Desc: Customizable print finishes and die-cut windows that turn packaging into shelf-ready presentation.
trays.use4Desc: Lightweight construction with strong load resistance — optimized for automated pick-and-pack lines.
trays.fluteDesc: All board FSC-certified and produced in-house on our Vietnam corrugation lines.
trays.flute1Desc: General-purpose trays with solid compression strength
trays.flute2Desc: Fine profile for inserts and high-quality printing
trays.flute3Desc: Heavy-duty fragile-item protection and stacking strength
trays.flute5Desc: Clean white printable surface for retail finish
trays.customTitle: Cut to your product, finished to your brand
trays.customDesc: We design every tray and insert around the specific dimensions, weight, and presentation needs of your product line.
trays.custom1: Custom-fit inserts, dividers, and cavity trays
trays.custom6: Standard and custom configurations at any scale
trays.qualityDesc: Every tray and insert design is verified for compression, drop, and vibration performance before production. We combine environmental performance with manufacturing efficiency — producing with ISO 9001-certified standards, recycled fiberboard, and sustainable coatings that meet global packaging requirements.
trays.quality3: Automated precision cutting for consistent fit
trays.formTitle: Get Pricing for Custom Trays & Inserts
trays.formDesc: Share your product dimensions, volume, and use case — we'll design a fit and send pricing within 1 business day.

mailerBoxes.heroTitle: E-Commerce Mailer Box Manufacturer in Vietnam
mailerBoxes.heroDesc: Custom die-cut corrugated mailer boxes engineered for brand impact, protection, and export performance.
mailerBoxes.introTitle: Premium E-Commerce Mailer Boxes for Global Brands
mailerBoxes.introBody: E-commerce requires packaging that protects products, enhances branding, and creates an exceptional unboxing experience. Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam manufactures custom corrugated mailer boxes, produced with precision die-cutting, offset printing, flexographic printing, and FSC® certified materials. Designed for strength, sustainability, and fast assembly, our mailer boxes are trusted by global brands in fashion, cosmetics, electronics, lifestyle, subscription boxes, and D2C e-commerce.
mailerBoxes.whyTitle: Why Our Vietnam Factory Is the Best Choice for E-Commerce Mailers
mailerBoxes.whyDesc: Our factory integrates corrugation, offset printing, die-cutting, gluing, and ISTA transportation testing, ensuring every mailer box arrives in perfect condition. We produce both single-wall E-flute mailers and double-wall BE/BC mailer boxes for heavier products and long-distance shipping.
mailerBoxes.why2: Premium offset & flexo printing for high-impact branding
mailerBoxes.why5: E-commerce optimized: fast assembly, auto-lock, tear strips
mailerBoxes.why6: Global export ready with ISTA testing
mailerBoxes.typesDesc: From standard die-cut mailers to luxury laminated unboxing experiences — we build what your brand needs.
mailerBoxes.type1Desc: Perfect for apparel, cosmetics, small electronics, and subscription boxes.
mailerBoxes.type2Desc: High-resolution printing with laminated finish for luxury unboxing.
mailerBoxes.type3Desc: Eco-friendly natural kraft look with strong B/E flute structures.
mailerBoxes.type4Desc: Fast assembly mailers ideal for fulfillment centers and high-speed packing.
mailerBoxes.type5Desc: Equipped with tear-strip closure and tamper-evident features.
mailerBoxes.type6Desc: Windows, perforations, and custom structures tailored to your product.
mailerBoxes.fluteDesc: All flutes FSC-certified, produced in-house at our Vietnam facility.
mailerBoxes.flute1Desc: Lightweight, retail-quality printing surface — ideal for premium mailers
mailerBoxes.flute2Desc: Stronger shipping mailers for heavier or fragile items
mailerBoxes.flute3Desc: Hybrid structure for added strength with premium print finish
mailerBoxes.flute4Desc: Maximum protection for heavy or high-value items
mailerBoxes.printingDesc: Your mailer box is the first physical touchpoint your customer sees. We combine offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for cost-efficient branding — strength and branding impact in one.
mailerBoxes.print1: Offset printing (up to 6 colors) with litho-lamination
mailerBoxes.print4: UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch finishes
mailerBoxes.print5: Inside printing for full unboxing experience
mailerBoxes.print6: Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
mailerBoxes.sustainTitle: Sustainable Mailer Boxes for a Greener E-Commerce Supply Chain
mailerBoxes.sustainDesc: E-commerce volume means e-commerce impact. Our mailers are engineered to minimize both material use and downstream waste.
mailerBoxes.sustain3: Reduced material use via structural optimization
mailerBoxes.capTitle: Vietnam Factory Capabilities for Mailer Box Production
mailerBoxes.capDesc: Consistent quality for both small pilot runs and large-volume e-commerce programs.
mailerBoxes.formTitle: Request a Quote for E-Commerce Mailer Boxes
mailerBoxes.formDesc: Tell us about your brand, product, volume, and launch timeline — we'll reply within 1 business day.

shippingBoxes.heroTitle: Shipping Boxes & Export Cartons Manufacturer in Vietnam
shippingBoxes.heroDesc: High-strength B/E/BC corrugated shipping cartons engineered for global transport and export reliability.
shippingBoxes.introTitle: Durable Corrugated Shipping Boxes for Global Export
shippingBoxes.introBody: Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam produces heavy-duty corrugated shipping boxes and export cartons engineered for long-distance transport, warehouse handling, and cross-border logistics. Boxes use high-strength corrugated board (B, C, E, BE, BC) combined with strict ISTA testing. Range covers standard RSC cartons through custom die-cut export packaging for industrial, retail, and e-commerce use.
shippingBoxes.whyTitle: Why Brands Choose XinYuan Vietnam for Export Cartons
shippingBoxes.whyDesc: Our factory integrates corrugation, printing, die-cutting, and testing in one streamlined workflow. Single-wall and double-wall cartons for heavy industrial goods, electronics, food, consumer goods, and fragile products.
shippingBoxes.why2: Designed for stacking, compression, and long-distance shipping
shippingBoxes.why3: Export-ready durability — sea, air, road logistics
shippingBoxes.why6: Reliable printing for handling & logistic marks
shippingBoxes.typesTitle: Types of Shipping Boxes We Manufacture
shippingBoxes.type1Desc: Most common export carton for industrial and consumer products.
shippingBoxes.type2Desc: Extra strength for heavy goods and long export routes.
shippingBoxes.type3Desc: Ideal for electronics, delicate items, and heavy loads.
shippingBoxes.type4Desc: Custom structures optimized for product fit and protection.
shippingBoxes.type5Desc: Outer packing, bulk items, warehouse distribution.
shippingBoxes.type6Desc: Optimized for container loading and Euro-pallet sizing.
shippingBoxes.boardDesc: All liners are FSC-certified and available in kraft and white top.
shippingBoxes.printingDesc: Combines offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for transit cartons.
shippingBoxes.print1: Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
shippingBoxes.print4: UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
shippingBoxes.print5: Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
shippingBoxes.print6: Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
shippingBoxes.testingDesc: Every export carton undergoes performance verification in our in-house ISTA lab.
shippingBoxes.formTitle: Get Pricing for Shipping Boxes & Export Cartons
shippingBoxes.formDesc: Tell us about your product, volume, and destination — we'll respond with a tailored quote within 1 business day.

certifications.heroDesc: At Jinhao Xinyuan Group, quality and sustainability are not claims — they're verified. Our factories across Vietnam, China, and Thailand are independently audited and certified by global organizations such as FSC®, ISO, SMETA, GMI, G7®, and ISTA.
certifications.introLead: These certifications ensure every packaging product meets strict environmental, safety, and performance standards.
certifications.iso9001Desc: Certified for the production of color boxes, color cartons, and flexo cartons, guaranteeing consistent quality and operational excellence.
certifications.fscDesc: Verified for the printing and sale of FSC Mix and recycled paper-based packaging, supporting responsible forest management.
certifications.gmiDesc: Certified in both Litho (Process Color & Spot Color) and Flexo (Direct Print Corrugate & Spot Color) methods, ensuring accurate brand color reproduction and high-quality printing standards.
certifications.g7Desc: Recognized for excellence in color management and printing consistency, meeting global industry benchmarks.
certifications.istaLabDesc: Fully equipped and certified to perform comprehensive transit testing, including drop, vibration, compression, and environmental conditioning, ensuring packaging integrity during transportation.
certifications.istaPdpDesc: Our team includes ISTA-certified professionals with expertise in packaging design, testing, and performance optimization.
certifications.closingLine: These certifications demonstrate our commitment to delivering packaging that meets the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and performance for global brands.
certifications.sustainIntro: At Jinhao Xinyuan, sustainability isn't an afterthought — it's part of our design and production DNA.
certifications.sustain3: SMETA-4P social responsibility audits across all factories
certifications.sustain4: Continuous R&D for eco-friendly coatings and biodegradable materials
certifications.requestDesc: Need official certificates or audit reports for verification? Our compliance team can provide authenticated copies on request.

contact.heroDesc: Ready to discuss your packaging needs? Reach out to our team for a tailored quote.
contact.phoneDesc: Contact via email for local numbers
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your packaging requirements — volume, dimensions, finishing, timeline...
contact.mapDesc: Production hubs in Vietnam, China, and Thailand — strategically located for global export.

footer.tagline: Premium packaging manufacturer in Vietnam & China. Specialists in FSC® certified, sustainable packaging for global export.
